title: 第2節　配送口の影
prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　灯りの底 / 第1話　惣菜棚の明かり. Shared talk background: 第3章第1話の夕方スーパー背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic dusk environment at a neighborhood supermarket near Sato's apartment. Show warm deli counter light, shopping baskets, a modest store exit, a hint of the loading entrance, and a residential street outside with early evening blue light. The tone should feel practical, local, and quietly rewarding after a full day out. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the shared stage, but show it from a hidden security-side, reverse angle, blind spot, rear approach, service path, or protected backside when appropriate. Scene focus: 第2節　配送口の影 / セラパート. Summary: 保冷バッグにしては深すぎた。 内側の仕切りは食品用ではなく、人の腕を固定する幅で切られている。配送口の先に停めた車両も、ロゴだけ新しく、荷室だけが空きすぎていた。スーパー帰りの… Key beats: 保冷バッグにしては深すぎた。 内側の仕切りは食品用ではなく、人の腕を固定する幅で切られている。配送口の先に停めた車両も、ロゴだけ新しく、荷室だけが空きすぎていた。スーパー帰りの客を狙うなら、袋を持った瞬間がいちばん無防備に見える。班はその単純さに賭けていた。 セラは裏口の短いスロープ脇へ回り込み、先に荷室側の通信を落とした。最初の男が保冷バッグを持ち上げた瞬間、その持ち手へ半歩だけ重心を加える。想定より深く沈んだ体勢を、もう一人が支えようとしたところへ肩を返した。倒れる音は、台車一つ分にも満たない。 残る一人は、店の自動ドアから死角になる駐輪場側で処理する。膝裏を払って壁際へ滑らせ、荷室の鍵だけを抜き取る。夕方の買い物客に見えるのは、せいぜい配送班の段取りが少し悪いという程度でいい。店の外へ怒声が出なければ、それで充分だった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. sera: セラ. Keep her consistent with the canonical Sera portrait, including the visible cat-ear support-security unit, without adding installment-specific redesign. The support unit is completed by the cat-ear headband alone, so do not add backpack rigs, back-mounted devices, extra mechanical arms, exoskeleton parts, visible cable bundles, or any other extra machinery. Do not give her knives, daggers, swords, blades, or any other bladed weapon. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.
